question: The line chart shows revenue from 1924 to 2024. Which statement best describes the main limitation when interpreting this chart?

options.A: The chart is too small to clearly read specific years and precise changes in revenue over time.
options.B: Revenue can be accurately compared for every decade using this chart alone.
options.C: Revenue clearly decreased in the 1970s compared with all other decades.
options.D: Revenue remained exactly the same throughout the entire period.

explanation: Revenue declined from 1980 to 1990. The extremely small axis labels can make it hard to read which period had the decline.
